select.isEqual: SELECT DISTINCT C_CLUBNO, CLOSESTATE, C_CLUBNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$ C_CLUBNAME, USERNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$ USERNAME, C_SYSOPID, APPLICATIONDATE FROM C_COMCLOSE A INNER JOIN C_MEMBERINFO B ON RTRIM(A.C_SYSOPID) = RTRIM(B.USERID) AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE $v_S_RADIO$ LIKE '%' || #v_KEYWORD# || '%' AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY APPLICATIONDATE DESC
select.isNotEqual: SELECT DISTINCT C_CLUBNO, CLOSESTATE, C_CLUBNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$ C_CLUBNAME, USERNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$ USERNAME, C_SYSOPID, APPLICATIONDATE FROM C_COMCLOSE A INNER JOIN C_MEMBERINFO B ON RTRIM(A.C_SYSOPID) = RTRIM(B.USERID) AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE $v_S_RADIO$ LIKE '%' || #v_KEYWORD# || '%' AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY $v_SORT1$ $v_SORT2$

select.isEqual: SELECT DISTINCT C_CLUBNO, CLOSESTATE, C_CLUBNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$ C_CLUBNAME, USERNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$ USERNAME, C_SYSOPID, APPLICATIONDATE FROM C_COMCLOSE A INNER JOIN C_MEMBERINFO B ON RTRIM(A.C_SYSOPID) = RTRIM(B.USERID) AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY APPLICATIONDATE DESC
select.isNotEqual: SELECT DISTINCT C_CLUBNO, CLOSESTATE, C_CLUBNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$ C_CLUBNAME, USERNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$ USERNAME, C_SYSOPID, APPLICATIONDATE FROM C_COMCLOSE A INNER JOIN C_MEMBERINFO B ON RTRIM(A.C_SYSOPID) = RTRIM(B.USERID) AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY $v_SORT1$ $v_SORT2$

sqlMap.select: SELECT NVL(COUNT(C_CLUBNO), 0) FROM C_COMCLOSE WHERE $v_S_RADIO$ LIKE '%' || #v_KEYWORD# || '%' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT NVL(COUNT(C_CLUBNO), 0) FROM C_COMCLOSE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

select.isEqual: SELECT C_CLUBNO, C_CLUBNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$ C_CLUBNAME, USERNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$ USERNAME, C_SYSOPID, C_REGDATE FROM C_CLUB A INNER JOIN C_MEMBERINFO B ON RTRIM(A.C_SYSOPID) = RTRIM(B.USERID) AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE $v_S_RADIO$ LIKE '%' || #v_KEYWORD# || '%' AND A.C_ADMINCONFIRM = 'N' AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY A.C_REGDATE DESC
select.isNotEqual: SELECT C_CLUBNO, C_CLUBNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$ C_CLUBNAME, USERNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$ USERNAME, C_SYSOPID, C_REGDATE FROM C_CLUB A INNER JOIN C_MEMBERINFO B ON RTRIM(A.C_SYSOPID) = RTRIM(B.USERID) AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE $v_S_RADIO$ LIKE '%' || #v_KEYWORD# || '%' AND A.C_ADMINCONFIRM = 'N' AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY $v_SORT1$ $v_SORT2$

select.isEqual: SELECT DISTINCT C_CLUBNO, C_CLUBNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$ C_CLUBNAME, USERNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$ USERNAME, C_SYSOPID, C_REGDATE FROM C_CLUB A INNER JOIN C_MEMBERINFO B ON RTRIM(A.C_SYSOPID) = B.USERID AND A.C_ADMINCONFIRM = 'N' AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY A.C_REGDATE DESC
select.isNotEqual: SELECT C_CLUBNO, C_CLUBNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$ C_CLUBNAME, USERNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$ USERNAME, C_SYSOPID, C_REGDATE FROM C_CLUB A INNER JOIN C_MEMBERINFO B ON RTRIM(A.C_SYSOPID) = RTRIM(B.USERID) AND A.C_ADMINCONFIRM = 'N' AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY $v_SORT1$ $v_SORT2$

sqlMap.select: SELECT NVL(COUNT(C_CLUBNO), 0) FROM C_CLUB WHERE $v_S_RADIO$ LIKE '%' || #v_KEYWORD# || '%' AND C_ADMINCONFIRM = 'N' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT NVL(COUNT(C_CLUBNO), 0) FROM C_CLUB WHERE C_ADMINCONFIRM = 'N' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT * FROM (SELECT C_CLUBNO, C_CLUBNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$ C_CLUBNAME, C_SYSOPID, C_CLUBDESC, C_REGDATE FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT C_CLUBNO, C_CLUBNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$ C_CLUBNAME, C_SYSOPID, C_CLUBDESC, C_REGDATE FROM C_CLUB
WHERE C_CLUBNO IN (SELECT C_CLUBNO FROM C_CLUB WHERE C_CLUBDESC LIKE '%' || #v_STRQUERY# || '%' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#) AND C_ADMINCONFIRM = 'Y' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
WHERE C_CLUBNO IN (SELECT C_CLUBNO FROM C_CLUB WHERE C_CLUBNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$ LIKE '%' || #v_STRQUERY# || '%' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#) AND C_ADMINCONFIRM = 'Y' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
WHERE C_ADMINCONFIRM = 'Y' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
ORDER BY C_REGDATE ASC) A WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_IQUERYCOUNT#) ORDER BY C_REGDATE DESC) WHERE ROWNUM <=10

SELECT NVL(COUNT(C_CLUBNO), 0) FROM C_CLUB
WHERE C_CLUBNO IN (SELECT C_CLUBNO FROM C_CLUB WHERE C_CLUBDESC LIKE '%' || #v_STRQUERY# || '%' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#) AND C_ADMINCONFIRM = 'Y' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
WHERE C_CLUBNO IN (SELECT C_CLUBNO FROM C_CLUB WHERE C_CLUBNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$ LIKE '%' || #v_STRQUERY# || '%' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#) AND C_ADMINCONFIRM = 'Y' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
WHERE C_ADMINCONFIRM = 'Y' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT C_SYSOPID, C_CLUBGUBUN, ISIN, C_CLUBDESC, C_CLUBCONFIRMTYPE, C_CLUBNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$ AS C_CLUBNAME, C_CATE_A, C_CATE_B, C_CATE_C FROM C_CLUB WHERE RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #v_CODE# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE C_CLUB SET C_CATE_A = #v_C_CATE_A#, C_CATE_B = #v_C_CATE_B#, C_CATE_C = #v_C_CATE_C#, C_CLUBNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$ = #v_C_CLUBNAME#, ISIN = 2 WHERE RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #v_CODE# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT CLOSEREASON FROM C_COMCLOSE WHERE RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #v_CODE# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT C_CLUBDESC FROM C_CLUB WHERE RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #v_CODE# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE C_COMCLOSE SET CLOSESTATE = #v_PCLOSESTATE# WHERE RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #v_CODE# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
UPDATE C_CLUB SET C_ADMINCONFIRM = 'C' WHERE RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #v_CODE# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE C_CLUB WHERE RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #v_CODE# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE C_CLUB SET C_ADMINCONFIRM = 'Y' WHERE RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #v_CODE# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO USER (USERID, USERNM, PASSWD, EMPNO, EMPTYPE, DEPTID, POSITIONID, JOBTITLEID, STATUS, EMAIL, MOBILETEL, OFFICETEL, FAX, HOMETEL, USERINTRO, JOINDATE, RETIREDATE, TOTALMILEAGE, RECENTMILEAGE, SEQ, REGDATE, PHOTOPATH, CONLEVEL, SUBDEPTID, ROLEINFO, TENANT_ID) VALUES (#v_CODE#, #v_COMNAME#, '', '', 'W', 'TOP', 1, 1, 'W', NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, 0, 0, NULL, SYSDATE, NULL, '', NULL, 'C', #tenantID#)
INSERT INTO ROLE (USERID, ROLETYPE, TENANT_ID) VALUES (#v_CODE#, 'C', #tenantID#)
sqlMap.select: SELECT B.EMAIL, B.USERNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$, A.C_CLUBNAME$v_USERINFO_LANG$ FROM C_CLUB A INNER JOIN C_MEMBERINFO B ON RTRIM(A.C_SYSOPID) = RTRIM(B.USERID) AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE RTRIM(A.C_CLUBNO) = #v_CODE# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE C_CLUB WHERE RTRIM(C_CLUBNO) = #v_CODE# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT USERNAME FROM C_MEMBERINFO WHERE RTRIM(USERID) = #v_ID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
